name: Logically
description: Logically — disinformation and narrative intelligence platform with API for platform integrity.

seo.title: Logically — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Logically: Logically — disinformation and narrative intelligence platform with API for platform integrity.

when_to_use: Detecting disinformation campaigns with AI narrative analysis
Building media monitoring systems for influence operation detection
Flagging coordinated inauthentic behavior in social media content
Integrating fact-check verification into content publishing flows

pros: Strong narrative intelligence and OSINT capabilities
Used by governments and large platforms
Good dashboard for analysts, not just API
review.verdict: Heavyweight disinformation intelligence tool for integrity teams, not a drop-in moderation API.
review.best_for: Government, elections, and large platforms running narrative intelligence programs.
review.not_for: Product teams wanting a simple REST moderation endpoint.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence

developer_experience.reason: API exists but limited public docs
